Column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_KEY of the table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3

Name

MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_KEY

Code

MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_KEY

Data Type

TEXT

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_KEY of the table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3

MD5 Based Composite Hash Key Comprising of

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE,

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE, __LOAD_TS

Column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY of the table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3

Card of the column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY of the table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3

Name

MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY

Code

MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY

Data Type

TEXT

Mandatory

No


Description of the column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY of the table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3

LEFT JOIN T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG pc

ON EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE = pc.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE

AND EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE = pc.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE

 

and __LOAD_TS in <T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG.__LOAD_TS , T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VALID_TO)

 

Detailed logic in attached query

Column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3

Card of the column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3

Name

VALID_FROM

Code

VALID_FROM

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3

VALID_FROM: Indicates the dattime when the validity of the record starts. As it is SCD Type 2 it's derived from the __LOAD_TS.

Column VALID_TO of the table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3

Card of the column VALID_TO of the table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3

Name

VALID_TO

Code

VALID_TO

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_TO of the table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3

VALID_TO: Indicates the dattime till when the record is/was valid. As it is SCD Type 2 it's derived from the __LOAD_TS. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31

Description of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT3
